{% extends "main.html" %} {% block content %} {{ page.content }} {% set ns = namespace(entries=[]) %} {% for post in nav.pages %} {% if post.file and post.file.src_uri[:2] == "D-" %} {% set base = post.file.src_uri.rsplit("/", 1)[-1].rsplit(".", 1)[0] %} {% set date_key = "00000000" %} {% set date_label = "-" %} {% if post.meta and post.meta.date %} {% set date_key = post.meta.date.strftime("%Y%m%d") %} {% set date_label = post.meta.date.strftime("%Y-%m-%d") %} {% else %} {% set raw = base %} {% if "_" in base %} {% set raw = base.rsplit("_", 1)[-1] %} {% endif %} {% set compact = raw|replace("-", "")|replace("_", "")|replace(" ", "")|replace(":", "") %} {% if compact|length >= 8 and compact[:8].isdigit() %} {% set year = compact[:4]|int %} {% set month = compact[4:6]|int %} {% set day = compact[6:8]|int %} {% if year >= 1900 and month >= 1 and month <= 12 and day >= 1 and day <= 31 %} {% set date_key = compact[:8] %} {% set date_label = compact[:4] ~ "-" ~ compact[4:6] ~ "-" ~ compact[6:8] %} {% endif %} {% else %} {% set tail10 = base[-10:] %} {% if tail10[0:4].isdigit() and tail10[4:5] == "-" and tail10[5:7].isdigit() and tail10[7:8] == "-" and tail10[8:10].isdigit() %} {% set month = tail10[5:7]|int %} {% set day = tail10[8:10]|int %} {% if month >= 1 and month <= 12 and day >= 1 and day <= 31 %} {% set date_key = tail10|replace("-", "") %} {% set date_label = tail10 %} {% endif %} {% endif %} {% endif %} {% endif %} {% set _ = ns.entries.append({"page": post, "date_key": date_key, "date_label": date_label}) %} {% endif %} {% endfor %} {% for entry in ns.entries|sort(attribute="date_key", reverse=true) %} {% set post = entry.page %} {% set excerpt_html = post.content|default("", true) %} {% if "" in excerpt_html %} {% set excerpt_html = excerpt_html.split("", 1)[1] %} {% elif "" in excerpt_html %} {% set excerpt_html = excerpt_html.split("", 1)[1] %} {% endif %}

{{ post.title }}

{{ entry.date_label }} {% if "" in excerpt_html %} {{ excerpt_html.split("", 1)[0] }} {% elif "

" in excerpt_html %} {{ (excerpt_html.split("

", 1)[0] ~ "

")|safe }} {% else %}

{{ post.meta.description if post.meta and post.meta.description else "Read the full post." }}

{% endif %}

Read more

{% endfor %} {% endblock %}
